debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
⊢ U ∼ V ↔ ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id

failed_attempts:
by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, finj, fsurj⟩ := h
    let g := λ v => Classical.some (fsurj v)
    exists f, g
    constructor
    · funext v; exact Classical.some_spec (fsurj v)
    · funext u; apply finj; exact Classical.some_spec (fsurj (f u))
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 heq
      have := congr_arg g heq
      change (g ∘ f) x1 = (g ∘ f) x2 at this
      rw [hgf] at this; exact this
    · intro y
      exists g y
      change (f ∘ g) y = y
      rw [hfg]; rfl
